---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: davidlop28

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the feature you'd like
What should it look like or do? Be as specific as you can — mockups or screenshots help.

## Which view(s) would this affect?
e.g. Month, Week, Biweek, Today, Next 7 Days, the integration's config flow, the visual editor, all views, etc.

## Alternatives you've considered
Workarounds you've tried or other ways the feature could work.

## Additional context
Screenshots, examples from other calendar apps, references — anything that helps clarify what you have in mind.
